asset_cache_authentication.from: no secret injected into the image-build cache step
asset_cache_authentication.mitigation_scope: inject HF_TOKEN only while the V6-specific asset-cache wrapper performs the same pinned public downloads; shared historical scripts remain byte-identical and the later V6 finalizer explicitly rejects token leakage

outcome_status_at_freeze: attempt A was stopped during image build before local entrypoint, protocol upload, claim, function call, GPU, W&B, or any V6 scientific outcome
prohibited_changes: any target word, J-lens layer/window/stride/calibration/sign/weight, optimizer, horizon, or curve node
any data allocation, seed, control, estimand, bootstrap, sign test, or acceptance threshold
any W&B entity, project, group, tag, prefix, or run ID
the one-L40S global cap, no-overlap policy, terminal no-resume policy, or evidence requirements

scientific_projection.required_v4_relationship: the canonical projection over these fields must remain byte-semantically identical in V1, V2, V3, and V4
